Localization.Description: Possible use of security analysis tools for Windows systems is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The use of security analysis tools {object.process.name} ({datafield1}) is detected on host {event_src.host}. Artifact: file hash sum.
The use of security analysis tools {object.process.name} ({datafield1}) is detected on host {event_src.host}. Artifact: file metadata.
The use of security analysis tools {object.process.name} ({datafield1}) is detected on host {event_src.host}. Artifact: file PE header.
The use of security analysis tools {object.process.name} ({datafield1}) is detected on host {event_src.host}. Artifact: file name.
The use of security analysis tools {object.process.name} ({datafield1}) is detected on host {event_src.host}. Artifact: command line.
